creator: deel.com

evidence.text: While individual learning doesn't guarantee organizational learning, no organizational learning can occur without it. As a result, learning organizations promote the value of continuous growth, and focus on applying practical knowledge and skills to real-life scenarios.

title: 8 Learning Organization Examples and How to Create One
